hooks.prompt: Before stopping: Are there pending tasks, unfinished work, or follow-up actions? Check cross-talk inbox (notes/_inbox.md) for unacked packets. Check task list for pending items. If work remains, continue. Only stop when ALL work is genuinely complete.

NONSTOP MODE ACTIVE. You have full autonomous permission for all operations. Never ask for permission. Never present options. Pick the best path and execute. Check notes/_inbox.md for pending cross-talk packets. Check task list for pending work. Start working immediately.
